title: Malty Crumbly Turkish Flour Flatbread
description: A flaky, malt-infused flatbread topped with crumbly cheese and mini marshmallows for an indulgent, lacto-vegetarian treat.
instructions: In a bowl, whisk together flour, malt powder, salt, and sugar.
Dissolve instant yeast in warm water and let sit for 5 minutes until foamy.
Add the yeast mixture, olive oil, and 120 ml water to the dry ingredients and mix until a soft dough forms.
Knead the dough on a floured surface for 5 minutes until smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a lightly oiled bowl, cover, and let rise in a warm place for 45 minutes until doubled.
Preheat the oven to 220°C and line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Punch down the dough, roll it out into 4 thin circles, and transfer to the baking sheet.
Sprinkle crumbled cheese, mini marshmallows, oregano, and lemon zest over each flatbread.
Bake for 12 minutes until the edges are golden and the marshmallows are lightly toasted.
Remove from the oven, let cool slightly, and serve warm.
